configurations.name: frontend
runtimeArgs: set NEXT_PUBLIC_ENABLE_DEV_TOOLS=true&& set NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000&& npm run dev

configurations.name: backend
runtimeArgs: set LLM_PROVIDER=local_ollama&& uv run --isolated --python 3.12.10 --with-requirements requirements.txt uvicorn app.main:app --port 8000
